mapper.select: select * from ( select b.book_num, b.book_name, b.publisher,b.publication_date, b.license_code, b.book_writer, COUNT(r.book_num) AS review_count from book b left outer join review r ON b.book_num = r.book_num group BY b.book_num, b.book_name, b.publisher,b.publication_date, b.license_code, b.book_writer order by review_count ) where rownum<=5

select count(*) from book b left outer join license l on l.license_code = b.license_code
and l.license_code = #{licenseType}
and book_name like '%${searchText}%'
and book_writer like '%${searchText}%'
and publisher like '%${searchText}%'
order by b.book_num

select b.book_num, b.book_name, b.publisher,b.publication_date, b.license_code, b.book_writer, COUNT(r.book_num) AS review_count from book b left outer join review r ON b.book_num = r.book_num left outer join license l on l.license_code = b.license_code
and l.license_code = #{licenseType}
and book_name like '%${searchText}%'
and book_writer like '%${searchText}%'
and publisher like '%${searchText}%'
group by b.book_num, b.book_name, b.publisher,b.publication_date, b.license_code, b.book_writer order by book_num
